ValidationRule.description: Parent Company must be completed for the Company if it is linked to a GAM. If the Company is directly linked to the GAM Parent Company should be the GAM itself.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c),AND(NOT(ISBLANK(GAM__c))) ,AND ( ISBLANK( ParentId ), OR (RecordType.Name = "Distributor", RecordType.Name = "Prospect", RecordType.Name = "Third Party") ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select a Parent Company in order to complete the attachment to the GAM. (The GAM itself if the Company is directly linked to the GAM)
